feed.title: SAP Community - BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx)
feed.subtitle: BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Possible to create multiple sales order in one go through any T.code?
entry.content:
Hi,

In our organization sometime we have to create more than 600 sales order in one go. Is there any T-code so we can create it bulk?

entry.title: We wanted to know the Exact estimation which we needed for Bulk Sales Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can we get the detailed estimation for below things in technical and functional days format?

Requirement to handle the following processes in bulk:
• Create Sales Orders in bulk
• Convert Sales Orders to Tax Invoices in bulk
• Generate Proforma Invoices in bulk
• Generate bulk outputs for both Proforma and Tax Invoices

entry.title: Transport of analytical query variants
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to transport analytical query variant created with queries from the Query Browser app (F1068)? I cannot find any documentation on this subject. Look forward to your response. 

 

Kind regards,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Precalculation Server "ERROR: program BIPRECXY not registered"
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

i am currently installing SAP precalculation server for SAP BW. When creating an server via transaction "rsprecalcadmin" i am not able to register the TP.

In SM59 the connection check of the created RFC connection shows following error:

I did set the gw/acl_mode to 0.

Reginfo is configured to allow any registrations.

 

Greetings
Rouven

entry.title: SAP bw bex report I have issue with japan currency divding by 100 kigfigure for current period
entry.content:
Hi Team 

Please help me I have issue with only JAPAN Currency inthe SAP BEX report value showing divided by 100, but remaining countries currency are working fine , This issue for only current period for Japan. But when I check infoprovoder  it's correct values for Japan .

Could you please provide me the solution.

 

Thank you 

Anil Kumar Busarapu

entry.title: Marketplace App Deployment & Lifecycle Management Using SAP DevOps Tools
entry.content:
In this discussion, we aim to explore the complete process of deploying and managing the lifecycle of a marketplace app development project using SAP DevOps tools. The goal is to understand how developers, DevOps engineers, and project managers can streamline continuous integration, testing, and delivery within the SAP ecosystem.

We’ll discuss best practices for:

Automating deployment pipelines for marketplace applications.

Integrating SAP Cloud Platform, CI/CD, and version control systems.

Managing updates, bug fixes, and scalability throughout the app’s lifecycle.

Ensuring security, compliance, and performance optimization in live environments.

Real-world challenges faced during app deployment and how SAP DevOps tools can help overcome them.

What to discuss:

What are your preferred SAP DevOps tools or workflows for marketplace app deployment?

How do you handle version control, rollbacks, and testing in a live environment?

Any insights or lessons learned from your own deployment experiences?

Let’s collaborate and share strategies, tools, and practical insights to make marketplace app deployment smoother, faster, and more reliable.

entry.title: Configuration for Setting Up Reminders for DP Exceptions in SAP VIM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any configuration available in SAP VIM to set up reminders for DP (Document Processing) Exceptions? Could you please explain the configuration steps or process involved in enabling and managing these reminders?

@vamsixk .

entry.title: SAP BW filtering with contains pattern
entry.content:
Dear collegues !
In SAP BW4/hana in a customer exit I would want to take the value from a variable take everything befure '-' and filter in another variable with * sign around it with the contains pattern. 
In another world if my variable hold 23141424-001-A  I would like to take the part *23141424* and filter with contains pattern in the another variable.

 

  Data: W_A_VAR_RANGE like LINE OF  I_T_VAR_RANGE,
      L_S_RANGE like LINE OF C_T_RANGE,
      searchText like W_A_VAR_RANGE-LOW,
      lv_result TYPE string .

CASE I_STEP.

when 1.
when 2.

   if  I_VNAM  =  'AQV_AMATERIAL_EOON'.
     Loop at I_T_VAR_RANGE into W_A_VAR_RANGE  where  VNAM = 'AQV_AMATERIAL_EOOI' and SIGN = 'I' and OPT = 'EQ' .
       SEARCHText = W_A_VAR_RANGE-LOW.
        SHIFT  SEARCHText LEFT DELETING LEADING '0'.

          SPLIT  SEARCHText AT '-' INTO lv_result DATA(lv_rest).
          clear searchtext.
          CONCATENATE '*' lv_result '*' into searchtext.
      W_A_VAR_RANGE-VNAM = 'AQV_AMATERIAL_EOON'.
       W_A_VAR_RANGE-OPT = 'CP'.
       W_A_VAR_RANGE-LOW = searchtext.
        MOVE-CORRESPONDING  W_A_VAR_RANGE to L_S_RANGE.
        append L_S_RANGE to c_t_range.

     endloop.

   endif.
endcase.
  endmethod.

 

The logic works fine but when I run the query it runs on an error.

As soon as I change the CP in the code to EQ the problem disappear. 
Can it be that in customer exits the contains pattern cannot be used  for filtering the query ?
If you could use it could you please give me an example code that it works with please ? 
I am using customer exit variable with multiple single values, because I will have several values.

Any help taken kindly thank you

entry.title: 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR & PA0000(CDS View) BW4HANA
entry.content:
hello All! 

Could anyone assist me? I’m creating a CompositeProvider in Eclipse for BW/4HANA modeling. I need to filter records for Transfer Postings, so I applied the MASSN code Z7 in PA0000 to extract all transfer-posting cases. To retrieve the latest updated information, I’m joining these PERNRs with PA0001, applying the filter ENDDA = 31.12.9999, so I can get the corresponding PERSK and PERSG values for the most current records.

Since the PA0001 data is available through the standard InfoObject 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR, I use that to retrieve PERSG and PERSK. However, for PA0000, I created a custom DataSource with code to extract the required MASSN-based records.

 

define view ZCDS_PA0000_Z7 as select from pa0000

 

 

{

key concat( pernr, begda )as ZCONC_KEY_UNIQUE,

 

key pernr,

key begda,

// key endda,

massn

}

 

where

 

//massn = 'Z4'

//or

massn = 'Z7'

 

Here is the rephrased version in a clear and professional way:

I mapped the start date (BEGDA) field to the standard InfoObject 0VALIDFROM.
When I run the InfoObject independently, it works fine and returns accurate results.
However, when I combine it with 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR, the output becomes incorrect for the condition ENDDA = 31.12.9999.

Whether I use a left outer join or an inner join, the issue remains the same:

  • PA0000 gives 199 records (MASSN = Z7)

  • PA0001 / 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR gives 153 updated records

  • But in the CompositeProvider, it still shows 199 records instead of 153, even though 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR should return only the updated records.

I am not sure why this mismatch is happening, since 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR is supposed to provide only the latest active record with ENDDA = 31.12.9999.

entry.title: How to create a maintenance plan, next planned date shall be considered based on the previous mainte
entry.content:
How to create a maintenance plan, next planned date shall be considered based on the previous maintenance call completion date.

What is the strategy parameters for this case

entry.title: BEx query with totals and plan by user input periods
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have requirement where user will input Fiscal period for example Jul.2025-Jun.2025 than query should display in rows item and branches and columns Unit, Price, estimated and budget values should display total for user input period whereas plan should display by period. Please find below screenshot for more details. 

My question is how to create structure where some keyfigures should show totals while other plan keyfigures should display plan data by month. Please suggest,  all your help and advise are welcome and greatly appreciated and points rewarded.

entry.title: Consolidation Plan & Actual Data
entry.content:
I want to consolidate Actual and Plan data, but I am facing an issue. The Actual data is coming from /FIGL14, which contains Cost Center, GL Account, and Amount. On the other hand, the planning Model X contains Commitment Item, GL Account, and Fund Center.

The challenge is that /FIGL14 does not contain Commitment Item and Fund Center, so I am unsure how to consolidate the data between these two structures. Could you please advise on how this can be handled?

 

If I use a left outer join, these are the values I am getting. However, the issue is that in the Actuals, the value is appearing against the GL Account instead of the Commitment Item. As a result, the actual data is showing only for the GL account, not for the commitment item.

entry.title: Report converted amount is not matching with manual conversion
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

In BW4HANA as per requirement created new key figure and added to report, to that key figure variable is assigned created in RSCUR which has exchange rate type is P and convert local currency to target currency EUR.

So converted amount us coming but user is checking manually with dividing exchange rate with target amount values are getting with some minor difference what could be the reason.

in excel column D is not matching with manual calculation column E

entry.title: Hi I would like to know if Dunning OPD is supported in Private Cloud?
entry.content: Hi I would like to know if Dunning OPD is supported in Private Cloud?

entry.title: Sap tds enhancement
entry.content:
Client has multiple company codes:
Company code A = 1000
Company code B = 2000
Company code C = 3000
Same vendor supplies to all company codes.
As per Indian Income Tax Section 194Q, TDS should apply once cumulative purchases exceed ₹50,00,000 across all mapped company codes.
Standard SAP checks threshold per company code only, 

How i can do enhancement .

entry.title: Table in BW Web template is shrinking if data is blank
entry.content: We have a 4 Week report (Web Template) where we are having 2 tables in the report, the first table will have the data for all categories by week wise and the other table will have the data at day level for the last week. If there is no data in the 4 week table, the column in the day wise table will shrink and the formatting is wrong., due to this the data is not showing correctly in the report and misleading the data in the report

entry.title: Bex selection filters are not working as expected once transported
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an issue as below in selection parameters

1. when I add the WBS to the selection filters of 0WBS_ELEMT in rows selection (directly in quality system I can see the data)

2, but when I do the same in development collect in RT and moved to QA, it is not working.

Prior check

1. I did analyze the master data existence, it is available in both systems (Development and Quality)

2, Tried transporting by recollecting the selections in QA number of time but no luck

3. Done RSRT generate query in both development and Quality system not working

4. Checked the RSDIRCOMP by selecting the affected query I can see three version (A, B M)

Environment

BW4HANA

Please help if you have any suggestions

 

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: SAP Industry-Specific Solutions Overview
entry.content: SAP Industry-Specific Solutions help organizations address operational requirements across sectors such as manufacturing, retail, healthcare, oil and gas, and utilities. These solutions support process integration, data management, compliance, supply chain operations, and business analytics while aligning enterprise workflows with industry-focused operational standards and business models.

entry.title: Bex report key figures header text is changing when the language is changed
entry.content: When the language is changing to Spanish the FTQ report header key figure description is changing to selection1, selection2 form4 and form5. The expectation is that key figure description still needs to be shown in English language only. It is correctly working in production system. whereas it is not working in nonproduction system (BQ2). I have attached the issue details.

entry.title: Bex report key figures header text is changing when the language is changed
entry.content: During the execution of Bex report (FTQ report) in portal when the user changes the language to Spanish, key figure descriptions are converting to selection1, selection2 form4 and form5. The expectation of the business user is that key figure description still needs to be shown in English language only. It is correctly working in production system. whereas it is not working in nonproduction system (BQ2). I have attached the issue details.
